changes_summary: Removed ADB.Media and ADB.MediaConfig assignments and configuration as they are related to tracking. Removed mediaConfig properties setup related to tracking server, player name, channel, app version, SSL, debug logging, and OVP. Removed adbFun.Media.configure call as it configures tracking behavior.
Removed the call to e.getSupplementalDataID and replaced it with null to prevent tracking. Preserved the structure and logic flow of the function while removing tracking-related data collection.
Removed the loop that processed and applied tracking-related functions from the queue. Cleared the queue to prevent any tracking functions from being executed.

Removed cookie read and write operations as they are used for tracking visitor sampling. Removed random number generation and sampling logic as it is related to tracking behavior. Replaced the entire function with a simple return of 1 to preserve the non-tracking behavior.

Removed tracking-related query parameter retrieval by setting 'b' to null. Neutralized supplemental data ID retrieval by setting 'a.supplementalDataID' to null. Preserved non-tracking behavior related to DOM and control flow.

Removed the retrieval of '_cls_s' cookie value as it is used for tracking. Removed the construction of the session replay link which involves user session data. Preserved the error logging functionality to maintain non-tracking behavior.

Removed adbFun.collectData calls as they are used for tracking data collection. Removed adbFun.getGlassboxSessionReplayLink call as it is used for session replay tracking. Removed event modifications based on email domain checks and similar product grid availability as they are used for tracking events. Set s_dell.eVar71 to null as adb_mcmid is likely a tracking identifier.

Removed tracking ID generation and assignment to 'a.fid'. Stubbed out 'a.timestamp' assignment with null. Removed URL and referrer tracking by setting 'a.pageURL' and 'a.referrer' to null. Stubbed out 'e' and 'g' variables to null to prevent tracking-related function calls. Removed supplemental data ID assignment by setting 'a.supplementalDataID' to null.

Replaced s_dell.apl calls with null to prevent event tracking. Removed Visitor.setCustomerIDs call to prevent user identification tracking. Replaced all assignments from tracking functions with null to preserve the structure without tracking.
Removed the call to t.send which was transmitting customer IDs, a tracking behavior.
Removed the call to g.getAudienceManagerBlob as it likely involves tracking behavior by collecting or transmitting user data.
Removed the call to t.send, which was transmitting customer IDs, a form of tracking behavior.
Replaced the entire function with a null return to remove tracking behavior related to reading cookies or local storage.

Removed the retrieval of the analytics object from window.s_c_il as it is used for tracking. Removed setting of contextData.getPreviousValue on the analytics object. Removed the cookieWrite and cookieRead functions as they are used for tracking user data via cookies. Replaced the logic that writes and reads cookies with null operations to prevent tracking while maintaining function structure.
Removed cookie setting logic using Z.set as it involves potential tracking through cookies. Preserved localStorage and sessionStorage logic as it may be used for non-tracking purposes.

Removed the retrieval and setting of contextData on the analytics object to prevent tracking. Removed the cookieWrite and cookieRead functions to prevent storing and reading cookies for tracking purposes. Stubbed out the logic that writes to and reads from cookies, replacing it with null assignments to preserve non-tracking behavior.
Removed cookie setting logic using Z.set as it involves potential tracking by storing cookies. Preserved localStorage and sessionStorage logic as it may be used for non-tracking purposes.
